title: Stainless Steel Whisk Set, 3 Packs Balloon Whisk for Cooking, Whisking, Blending (8",10",12")
features: Multiple Sizes : This egg beater has three sizes for you to choose from, which are 12 inches, 10 inches, and 8 inches, you can choose the right size egg beater according to the size of the bowl.
High Quality Material : Made of high-quality durable stainless steel and highly polished processing methods, no worries of rust. You can use the whisk set for a long time.

Multi Purpose : This kitchen whisk is ergonomically designed, lightweight, and does not take up space, it is suitable for various cooking places, such as making cakes, whipping cream, stirring batter, and baking pastries, etc, making us more interested in cooking.

Easy To Clean And Store : The handle is rust-resistant and non-stick, making it easy to clean; the handle has a hole design, which can be easily hung on any hook in the kitchen for easy storage, a must-have for home cooks and restaurant chefs.

Satisfaction Guaranteed : Our team is committed to providing every customer with good large small metal mini whisk sets and satisfactory service. If there are any problems with our stainless steel egg wire tiny whisks for cooking baking, contact us and we would be very happy to solve your problems.

Ergonomic Handle Design The stainless steel wisk is ergonomically designed with excellent balance and control,so that you can really feel the difference in your hand.
